Tests if `Object.toLocaleString()` returns the same result as `Object.toString()`.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion that checks the equality of the `toLocaleString` and `toString` methods of the `Object` prototype in JavaScript. It verifies that calling `Object.toLocaleString()` returns the same result as `Object.toString()`. This is a narrow functionality test, likely used to ensure consistency between these two methods in the JavaScript environment. The assertion will throw an error if the condition is false, indicating a discrepancy between the two method outputs.
